text.title: Hourly Rate Floor Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a rate-floor artifact. Subagent must satisfy this before returning a rate recommendation.

field.name: rate_bands
field.constraint: bottom < floor < stretch AND each is positive integer

forbidden.pattern: billable_utilization_pct > 0.6 (violates r1) — exceptions require operator override note
effective_tax_rate_pct < 0.15 in jurisdictions where self-employment tax / NI applies (under-grossed)
annual_overhead == 0 OR overhead_categories list missing healthcare for solo US/PT/UA operators
Output that is a single number instead of 3 bands (violates r4)
jurisdiction field referencing client jurisdiction, not operator jurisdiction (violates r5)
rate_bands where stretch / floor < 1.2 (insufficient margin for savings + reinvestment)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Adjust utilization to 60% only when operator can document > 6 months of sustained billable hours above 55%.
Substitute different currency; conversion happens at the floor output level, not during the calculation.
Mark a band as "negotiation-only" (e.g., stretch) when operator is in a particularly tight market for < 90 days.

list.item: effective_tax_rate_pct includes self-employment / NI / VAT where applicable
annual_overhead lists at least healthcare, tools, accounting
Three bands present, ordered bottom < floor < stretch
Recompute trigger array present (so operator knows when to redo)
